title: Empty query when selecting a field from a view made of UNION ALL
poc: create table foo_1 (id int, value text);
create table foo_2 (id int, value text);
SELECT field_A FROM some_view ORDER BY field_B LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: Selecting field from UNION ALL view returns empty query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE foo_1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE foo_2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT DEFAULT 'default_value');
INSERT INTO foo_2 (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'test3');
CREATE VIEW some_view AS SELECT value FROM foo_1 UNION ALL SELECT value FROM foo_2;
